hero.title: Move, don't remove.
hero.subtitle: A safer Mac cleaner that moves files to Trash instead of permanently deleting them.

lume.1: Always moves to macOS Trash — fully undoable
lume.2: If Trash fails, your file stays untouched
lume.5: Concurrent worker pool — seconds, not minutes

install.title: Install
install.note: That's it. No sudo make install. No fuss.

junk.title: System Junk
junk.desc: 55+ scan targets covering Apple caches, IDEs, package managers, browsers, and Electron apps.

duplicates.title: Duplicate Files
duplicates.desc: 3-stage SHA-256 pipeline for zero false positives. 100 GB in ~10 seconds.

zombie.title: Zombie Hunter
zombie.desc: File access time heatmap. Find files untouched for over a year.

trend.title: Disk Trend
trend.desc: 90-day disk usage history. Spot the leak before you run out.

large.title: Large Files
large.desc: Streaming metadata scan — no lag even on 10 GB+ files.

themes.title: Themes
themes.desc: Press t to cycle through built-in themes:

safe.a: Everything goes to macOS Trash. If our 3-tier strategy fails entirely, the file stays where it is. We never fall back to permanent deletion.

why.a: CleanMyMac costs $35+/yr, uses rm not Trash, is closed-source, and finds fewer developer caches. Lume is free, open-source, 100% undoable, and built for developers.

sudo.a: No. Lume only touches user-accessible files.

performance.a: < 50 MB RAM. Most scans finish in seconds. Non-blocking TUI with background goroutines.
